purpose: IDE search/replace sidebar that REPLACES FileExplorer when state.ideSidebarView === 'search'. Owns search query input, three regex/case/wholeWord toggle buttons, optional replace input row (toggled via chevron on left), and collapsible include/exclude glob filters. Search is debounced 300ms via debounceRef; Enter triggers immediate execution. Calls window.electronAPI.ideSearch(workspace.path, query, options) and dispatches IDE_SET_SEARCH_RESULTS with { results, totalMatches, truncated }. Replace All calls window.electronAPI.ideSearchReplace(workspacePath, [{file, matches, replacement}]) for every file in results. ESC key behavior: clears results if any, else returns to explorer view. Single-file replace via handleReplaceInFile (passed down through SearchResults? No — currently unused at panel level; defined but only called via the FileGroup-level button if added).
gotchas: Uses `var` (not const/let) and function-expression callbacks — looks like older transpile target / hand-written ES5-flavored code; behavior is identical but inconsistent with rest of codebase.

handleReplaceAll has a buggy guard: `!replaceText === undefined` — that's `!replaceText` evaluated then compared to undefined, which is ALWAYS false (so guard never triggers). Likely intended `replaceText === undefined`. Actual replace still works because empty string is allowed (e.g., delete-mode replace).
toggleOption sets newOptions = { [key]: !options[key] } — the dispatch payload is partial; reducer must MERGE with existing options or filters reset on toggle.
Re-search after toggleOption runs after 100ms debounce using a stale options snapshot merged inline ({ ...options, ...newOptions }) — this avoids the React state lag but means rapid toggles can race.
executeSearch's 'no api' branch dispatches results=[] but does NOT clear loading flag — could leave the panel in 'Searching...' forever if IPC vanishes mid-session.
handleReplaceInFile is defined but I don't see it called — appears to be dead code or wired through SearchResults (which currently doesn't pass it through).
Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+F handler in IDEView focuses '.ide-search-input' — DOM class must remain stable.
Initial focus uses inputRef.current?.focus() in mount effect — empty deps so it runs once.
patterns: Debounced search input (300ms) + Enter for immediate execution.
Search options stored globally in AppContext (state.ideSearchOptions = { regex, caseSensitive, wholeWord, includeGlob, excludeGlob }) — persistent across panel toggles.
Single source of truth: results, query, options, replaceMode, replaceText, loading all live in AppContext via IDE_SET_SEARCH_* actions.
'Back to Explorer' button + ESC key both flip ideSidebarView to 'explorer'.
conventions: Arrow buttons toggle replace row (.ide-search-mode-toggle) — chevron rotates via 'expanded' class.
Three-letter regex/case/word toggle buttons with monospace icon glyphs ('.*', 'Aa', 'ab' underlined).
